name: Le Loup's Shrimp St. Tropez
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Pernod or Ricard anise liqueur
1/4 cup White wine, fruity (such as Rhine or Vouvray)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add shrimp and season with salt and pepper. Cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes per side.
3. Remove shrimp and set aside.
4. In the same skillet, add bell peppers and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
5. Add mushrooms and cook until they release their juices and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
6. Stir in spinach and shallots, cooking until spinach is wilted.
7. Toss in parsley, basil, oregano, and thyme. Cook for an additional minute.
8. Return shrimp to the skillet and stir in Pernod or Ricard liqueur and white wine.
9. Simmer together until all ingredients are heated through, about 5 minutes.
10. Turn off heat and serve immediately.
